race.comment: Wide open race. GRAPHIC SIGHT (11) appeals first-up for Gai and Adrian. Opened last prep with a dominant all-the-way win over this trip at Goulburn then was competitive at Wyong before the form fell away. Now a gelding and trialled well recently. Expecting more from him this prep. SOCIABLE (4) started even-money and had every chance but could only manage second when resuming over this distance at Hawkesbury last time. Trialled since so should strip a lot fitter. Worth another chance at a far bigger price this time around. NANDINA (6) came from last on the bend in a small field to get up for second last time out in a comparable race to this. Lightly raced filly who will be cherry ripe at the third run back from a spell. CAPTURE ME (9) resumes. Opened last prep with a dominant win in a $50k maiden at Gosford. Two recent trials should have him right up to the mark. MRS MAREE (12) has been competitive all prep. New to a heavy track but the dam is by Snitzel so she should cope.
